title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash, a multimodal AI model supporting vision, video, code generation, and workspace integration. The video demonstrates eight workflows including contract analysis, app coding from sketches, receipt OCR, and agentic chains across Google Workspace apps.
